message:
feat: Add gen-opcodes build step to auto-generate opcodes from QuickJS

Parses vendor/quickjs-ng/quickjs-opcode.h and generates opcodes_gen.zig
with all 267 opcodes, their sizes, stack effects, and formats.

Usage: zig build gen-opcodes

This ensures freeze stays in sync when QuickJS is updated - just
regenerate the file instead of manual maintenance.

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,606 @@
+//! QuickJS Opcode Definitions
+//! AUTO-GENERATED from quickjs-opcode.h - DO NOT EDIT MANUALLY
+//!
+//! Regenerate with: zig build gen-opcodes
+//! Source: vendor/quickjs-ng/quickjs-opcode.h
+
+const std = @import("std");
+
+/// Instruction format types
+pub const Format = enum {
+    none,
+    none_int,
+    none_loc,
+    none_arg,
+    none_var_ref,
+    u8,
+    i8,
+    loc8,
+    const8,
+    label8,
+    u16,
+    i16,
+    label16,
+    npop,
+    npopx,
+    npop_u16,
+    loc,
+    arg,
+    var_ref,
+    u32,
+    u32x2,
+    i32,
+    @"const",
+    label,
+    atom,
+    atom_u8,
+    atom_u16,
+    atom_label_u8,
+    atom_label_u16,
+    label_u16,
+};
+

+
+/// Get metadata for an opcode
+pub fn getInfo(op: Opcode) OpcodeInfo {
+    return opcode_info[@intFromEnum(op)];
+}
+
+/// Get instruction size for an opcode
+pub fn getSize(op: Opcode) u8 {
+    return opcode_info[@intFromEnum(op)].size;
+}
